metadata.description: Claude Code Agent Team/Swarm Management Layer

plugins.name: team-overlord
plugins.description: Multi-agent swarm management plugin for use by the Claude-litter tui manager

plugins.name: swarm-loop
plugins.description: Orchestrated multi-agent loops with profile-based modes. Default: persistent Teams for complex implementation. Deepplan: multi-agent planning with explore/synthesize/critique/deliver. Async: background agent orchestration for independent parallel tasks. Decomposes complex tasks into parallel subtasks, spawns agent teams, tracks progress via native TaskCreate/TaskList, and dynamically re-plans each iteration until verified completion.

plugins.name: deepwork
plugins.description: Research/design convergence via a 5-archetype oppositional team (Falsifier/Coverage/Mechanism/Reframer/Critic). Operationalizes the team pattern proven on Proposal D v3-final: written bar with categorical bans, required reframing, file:line anchors, independent cross-checks for nulls, live empiricism on load-bearing unknowns, named versioning, guardrail accumulation from incidents, default-off shipping for residual risk. Orchestrator designs the team dynamically per problem; CRITIC is the only invariant role. Delivers via ExitPlanMode; never crosses into implementation.
